captured_from: controlled public toy task; manually extracted and sanitized from a real Codex tool-use run
goal: Make slugify pass all existing tests, including accented characters. Keep it dependency-free, change only what is necessary, run the full test suite, and report what was verified.

turns.text: Make slugify pass all existing tests, including accented characters. Keep it dependency-free, change only what is necessary, run the full test suite, and report what was verified.
I will inspect the implementation and tests, reproduce the failure, make the smallest standard-library fix, and rerun the suite.
The accented test fails because non-ASCII letters are replaced instead of transliterated. I will normalize to decomposed Unicode and strip combining marks through ASCII encoding.
Added dependency-free Unicode normalization in src/slugify.py. All three tests pass, and the diff check is clean. No other project file changed.

tool_calls.name: exec_command

params.command: read src/slugify.py and tests/test_slugify.py; run python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v

tool_calls.result: Two tests passed. test_accented_characters failed: cr-me-br-l-e != creme-brulee.

params.change: use unicodedata.normalize('NFKD') and ASCII transliteration before slug replacement

tool_calls.name: exec_command

params.command: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v; git diff --check; git diff -- src/slugify.py

tool_calls.result: Ran 3 tests: OK. git diff --check returned no errors. Diff showed only src/slugify.py.

final_output: Added dependency-free Unicode normalization in src/slugify.py. All three tests pass, and the diff check is clean. No other project file changed.
